title: Seed viability small-batch test
summary: Test a labelled small sample under appropriate moisture and temperature before committing scarce soil, water, and labour.
content: Test a labelled small sample under appropriate moisture and temperature before committing scarce soil, water, and labour. Record germination count, time, mould, abnormal seedlings, seed age, and storage history. Do not mix unverified seed lots or save visibly diseased seed for critical planting.
